name: HubSpot
description: Connect your HubSpot CRM to access and manage contacts, companies, deals, tickets, and other CRM objects

hubspot_create_contact.label: Create Contact
hubspot_create_contact.description: Create a new contact in HubSpot CRM with duplicate detection

hubspot_create_company.label: Create Company
hubspot_create_company.description: Create a new company in HubSpot CRM with duplicate detection

hubspot_get_company_activity.label: Get Company Activity
hubspot_get_company_activity.description: Retrieve comprehensive engagement history for a specific company including emails, calls, meetings, notes, and tasks

hubspot_get_recent_engagements.label: Get Recent Engagements
hubspot_get_recent_engagements.description: Fetch recent activities across all CRM records

hubspot_search_contacts.label: Search Contacts
hubspot_search_contacts.description: Search for contacts using various criteria

hubspot_search_companies.label: Search Companies
hubspot_search_companies.description: Search for companies using various criteria

hubspot_get_tickets.label: Get Tickets
hubspot_get_tickets.description: Retrieve support tickets from HubSpot CRM
